creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
But, mmm, a user with a restricted shell should not be allowed to run chpass, the idea is that they have a shell with a restricted number of commands available, and thus, cannot run chpass.

It'd a bit like giving me a restricted shell allowing me to run vim. Ok, so, I will run vim, then :!csh, and I'll be out of the restricted area.
